meaning: adj.无可指责的,不可非难的,无缺点的,无过失的
examples: She welcomed her unexpected visitor with irreproachable politeness.
A man of irreproachable conduct commands the respect of others.
It emerged that her past behavior was far from irreproachable.
"It is a sport which demands an irreproachable lifestyle, a sport which demands a rigor, " Riner says.
His old friends hardly recognized this new Pereda as the lawyer they had known, who had been irreproachable in every respect.
